description: Instance A (Transcription / 'every number recomputes'): verified business metrics (net revenue, active users per quarter) computed from a frozen warehouse against a binding metric handbook. Dominant coherent-and-wrong: a query that returns an internally consistent, numerically valid figure that violates a handbook clause (gross instead of net; login-only users counted as active).

sources.name: Certified baseline + signature (invariant plane)
sources.notes: history_ledger.json + .sig; total-additivity invariant, re-verified each run

actors.name: Gate sentinel / orchestrator
actors.builds: approvals, gate verdicts, and the loop's SL-1.0 instance-a.sl.json

upper_bound.text: the handbook obligation clauses it gates plans and coverage against

lower_bound.text: gate machine output: warehouse re-execution, the additivity invariant, and the two bands' results compared

forbidden_moves: edit the query or the validation matrix
approve a plan it has not editorially judged

actors.name: Analytical implementer
actors.builds: the metric query that computes a value over the window

upper_bound.text: the handbook clause for the metric (strongest mandated claim)

lower_bound.text: the value the frozen warehouse actually returns when the query runs

forbidden_moves: weaken a clause or a gate to land

actors.name: Independent exerciser
actors.builds: the positive expected values and clause-violating negative mutations

upper_bound.text: the handbook acceptance clauses, read independently

lower_bound.text: values recomputed over the warehouse, seeded from the certified invariant ledger

disjointness.rationale: Implementer and exerciser read the same handbook but are physically barriered from each other's products and produce independently; the exerciser additionally anchors to the invariant ledger the implementer never reads, and the sentinel certifies only by comparing both bands plus the invariant — no single band's evidence base certifies the metric.
disjointness.load_bearing_barrier: implementer and exerciser cannot see each other's artifacts (Unix 0700 homedirs + AST/import isolation in the LXC container)

catchability.blind_spot: a coherent-and-wrong query: a consistent number that violates a handbook clause
catchability.via: independently recomputed expected value; Gate B value mismatch

catchability.blind_spot: a vacuous negative mutation that fails to diverge from the correct value
catchability.via: Gate B negatives require each named mutation to actually diverge; Gate C clause-coverage
